Instructor
Small-Group Tutoring Sign Ups are open! Tutoring sections begin this week.
Want 1-on-1 or 1-on-2 help? Limited availability remaining (QR code top right).
.
Regular: Attendance is required weekly. You may be dropped from your section if there
are multiple unexcused absences.
Drop-In: Attendance is not required weekly. Signs occur weekly for seats and these seats
are reset on a week-to-week basis.
Catch-up sessions: Every Friday 3-4 PM @ Evans B6
Watch the recorded Mini-Lecture before discussion section!
Reminder: Change in Josh OH: Friday 2/6 12-2pm online (this week only)
